name: TC-NFR-002: Update Product Details Performance Test (Full Replace)
description: Verify that the product update endpoint (/api/v1/products/{product_id}) meets performance requirements when processing concurrent PUT requests that fully replace product records.
corresponding_NFR: NFR-2: Update Product Details (Full Replace) — max response time ≤ 700 ms at 90th percentile, data consistency ensured on subsequent GETs, error rate < 1%, 30 concurrent PUT operations supported.
preconditions: Product IDs used during testing must already exist in the database.
A test database snapshot with known product IDs should be prepared.
A valid authentication token (Authorization: Bearer <token>) must be included in all request headers.
notes: Ensure product IDs are pre-seeded and not shared across concurrent threads to avoid lock contention. After each PUT, issue a GET to validate data consistency. Monitor for optimistic lock errors or stale data responses.
